title: Fix OTP Auth Error, Orange/White Dark UI Redesign & Domain Settings

requirements.text: Fix the OTP generation error 'Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can generate OTPs' in the backend. The `generateOTP` function must allow unauthenticated (anonymous) callers so that new players can register and existing players can log in without needing a prior authenticated session.

quotes: Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can generate OTPs
ye dono me aa raha h admine me bhi or user me bhi

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Send OTP' on the Register page no longer shows 'Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can generate OTPs'.
Clicking 'Send OTP' on the Login page no longer shows the unauthorized error.
OTP is generated and returned successfully for any caller (anonymous or authenticated).
Admin panel OTP-related flows also work without the authorization error.

requirements.text: Redesign the entire frontend UI — both the Player Panel (Register, Login, Dashboard, Home, Tournaments, Terms pages) and the Admin Panel (Admin Login, Admin Dashboard) — with a dark background base and a mixed orange & white color theme. Use deep dark backgrounds (near-black or very dark gray), vibrant orange as the primary accent color for buttons, highlights, borders, and active states, and white/light gray for primary text and secondary elements. Apply this consistently across all pages, cards, forms, modals, headers, footers, and navigation.

quotes: color orrange with white mix color or dark background dono me karna admin or user me bhi

acceptanceCriteria: All pages (Home, Register, Login, Dashboard, Tournaments, Terms, Admin Login, Admin Dashboard) have a dark background.
Orange is used consistently as the primary accent color for buttons, active nav links, step indicators, badges, and highlights.
White or light gray is used for body text, headings, input text, and secondary UI elements.
No white/light backgrounds remain on any page or major component.
The orange/white/dark theme is cohesive and consistent across Player Panel and Admin Panel.
The Raj Empire Esports logo and branding remain intact.

requirements.text: Add a persistent `domainName` field to the backend actor state with a default value of 'Raj-Empire-Esports'. Expose `getDomainName` (public query) and `setDomainName` (admin-only update) functions.

quotes: mujhe domain wala optione ana chahiye taki me khud se domain change kar sakun
domain me tum Raj-Empire-Esports ye rakh do

acceptanceCriteria: Backend has a stable `domainName` variable initialized to 'Raj-Empire-Esports'.
`getDomainName` returns the current domain name to any caller.
`setDomainName` updates the domain name and persists across upgrades.

requirements.text: Add a 'Domain Settings' section in the Admin Dashboard page. It must display the current domain name fetched from the backend and provide a text input field with a Save button that allows the admin to update the domain name. The default value shown must be 'Raj-Empire-Esports'.

quotes: mujhe domain wala optione ana chahiye taki me khud se domain change kar sakun
domain me tum Raj-Empire-Esports ye rakh do

acceptanceCriteria: Admin Dashboard has a 'Domain Settings' tab or section.
The current domain name is fetched from the backend and displayed in an editable input field.
The input field is pre-populated with 'Raj-Empire-Esports' by default.
Admin can type a new domain name and click Save to update it via the backend.
A success or error message is shown after saving.
The domain settings section matches the orange/white/dark theme.

constraints: Do not remove or break existing tournament, registration, player profile, support ticket, or social links functionality.
The Raj Empire Esports logo must remain visible and intact across all pages.
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Admin authentication remains hardcoded via AdminAuthContext — do not change the admin auth mechanism.
nonGoals: Changing the app's routing structure or adding new pages beyond what is specified.
Implementing real SMS OTP delivery — OTP logic stays within the canister.
Adding new tournament or payment features.
